Switch to Mac: Power Your Business with Apple Ecosystem

Make the switch to performance and reliability with Mac—designed for modern businesses seeking speed, security, and seamless collaboration across teams.

Learn More

Mac does That

Whether you're a small business or a large enterprise, there's never been a better time to put the power of Mac to work. Super-easy management. Built-in security. All the apps businesses use to get the job done. No matter what needs doing, Mac does that.

Learn more

MacBook Air

MacBook Air is designed to support everyday business workflows, so a variety of users across departments and job functions can use Mac to get things done. When employees have the right tools, they can be more engaged, creative, and productive at work.

Learn more

MacBook Air is designed to support everyday business workflows, so a variety of users across departments and job functions can use Mac to get things done.

Privacy and Security 🔒 Made for Your Business.

with an Apple Business Partner by your side.

Apple designs its hardware and software to work seamlessly together, ensuring advanced security that's always active — with no additional effort. This makes it easier to safeguard your employees, devices, and company data.

No Room for Malware

With built-in XProtect, your system automatically detects and removes viruses and malware. Gatekeeper and app notarisation work in the background to prevent accidental downloads of harmful software — keeping you and your team secure.

Updates That Run Themselves

Stay protected effortlessly with free automatic updates. Apple ensures your system software is always up to date, giving you the latest features and defenses against new threats.

Lost. And ... found.

Find My can help you locate a misplaced device and remotely lock or erase it. So even if you leave your device behind, you can find it fast.

Touch. Look. Unlock.

Face ID and Touch ID allow employees to access devices, files and passkeys with just a glance or tap. You get airtight security without having to remember complicated passwords.

Productivity + Management + Adoption

Keep Scrolling on Right

Apple silicon

Fast that lasts.

Apple silicon brings game-changing speed and battery life for demanding tasks.


Apple ecosystem

Keep up the good work.

Start on Mac, finish on iPhone. Built-in features help teams sync easily.

Apps

Make it a job, well done.

iPhone and Mac run powerful apps for every job site or office workflow.

Apple Intelligence

Private. Powerful.

AI tools for summaries, rewrites, and communication — built-in securely.

Workflow tools

Team up easily.

Collaborate using apps and native Apple features across devices.

Apple for Small Business: Empowering Growth with Innovation

Mac does that

Whether you’re a small business or a large enterprise, there’s never been a better time to put the power of Mac to work. Super-easy management. Built-in security. All the apps businesses use to get the job done. No matter what needs doing, Mac does that.

Learn More

Hassle-Free Deployment for Growing Teams

As small businesses embrace hybrid and remote work environments, Apple simplifies device deployment with zero-touch enrollment. Whether you're equipping 10 or 1,000 employees, Apple ensures:

Learn More

Apple Employee Choice

If you give employees the power to work on a device of their choice, it inspires them to bring their best to work every day. Apple has simplified the process of giving employees the device of their choice while simplifying IT management and maintaining corporate standards.

Learn More

Apps that enhance the way you work

With over 235,000 apps for employees at work, they can tackle almost everything from daily tasks to boosting customer experiences or apps that make operations efficient. Not just that, you can also build custom apps tailored to your specific needs.

Learn More

One manager for your entire organization

Apple Business Manager helps you enroll, deploy & manage Apple devices seamlessly across your organization. It also helps you easily buy & distribute apps in bulk to employees, whether with just one team or the whole organization.

Learn More
Comprehensive Support for your growing business

Apple Care for Enterprise

Comprehensive coverage including expert technical support, accidental damage protection, and hardware service—all from Apple, the people who know your devices best.

Let’s Dive In

AppleCare+

Comprehensive coverage including expert technical support, accidental damage protection, and hardware service—all from Apple, the people who know your devices best.

Let’s Dive In

Dedicated Enterprise Support

Gain access to expert support and tailor-made solutions to meet the unique demands of your industry.

End-to-End Solutions

Cloud storage for secure file access and sharing.
Deployment tools for streamlined device management.
Planning and training for seamless adoption of Apple technologies.

Apple Certified Experts take
care of your IT needs.

Our Technology Solutions team is ready to assist you in discovering the perfect digital tools for your organization—whether you're launching, expanding, or simply streamlining operations.


Apple Experts

Readily available.

Our Presales & IT Teams are easy to reach and easy to work with. Get advice on devices, apps — even financing — in person or by phone.

We master our craft

And understand yours.

We understand what it takes to run a small business, so we can guide you on everything from new employee onboarding to troubleshooting to preparing to scale up.

Training & Enablement

Everything to keep you ahead.

Join virtual sessions and exclusive events like "Digital Transformation Essentials" — a tailored workshop that shows how technology can drive your business growth.

Contact Our Specialists

Connect 🤝 with a specialist.

Why Choose Sniper Your Trusted Apple Business Partner?

At Sniper Systems, we deliver comprehensive IT solutions that empower your business to stay secure, productive, and future-ready. Backed by the power of Apple, our services are tailored to streamline operations and integrate technology seamlessly.

15+ Years of Enterprise Experience

Decades of expertise in delivering enterprise-grade IT solutions.

7 + Locations

Extensive network of service centers for comprehensive support.

Managed IT Services

Proactive management of your IT infrastructure for optimal performance.

Device Procurement & Deployment

Streamlined acquisition and setup of your technology devices.

System Driven Enterprise Support

Structured support systems designed for enterprise needs.

AppleCare & Extended Support

Comprehensive Apple support solutions beyond standard warranties.

Cloud & Collaboration Solutions

Modern cloud-based tools to enhance team productivity.

150+ Certified Sales & Support Team

Highly trained professionals dedicated to your success.

Sustainable Lifecycle Solutions

Environmentally responsible technology lifecycle management.

◊Legal Disclaimers

  • Apple Intelligence: Apple Intelligence is available in beta on all Mac models with M1 and later, with Siri and device language set to US English, as a macOS Sequoia update. English (Australia, Canada, Ireland, New Zealand, South Africa, UK) language support will be available in December 2024. Some features and support for additional languages, like Chinese, English (India, Singapore), French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Spanish, Vietnamese and others, will be coming over the course of the next year.

  • Display: Screen size is measured diagonally. Actual diagonal screen size of the 24″ iMac is 59.69 cm (23.5″). The displays on the 13″ and 15″ MacBook Air and the 14″ and 16″ MacBook Pro have rounded corners at the top. When measured as a standard rectangular shape, the screens are 34.46 cm (13.6″), 38.91 cm (15.3″), 35.97 cm (14.2″) and 41.05 cm (16.2″) diagonally (actual viewable area is less).

  • Storage: 1GB = 1 billion bytes and 1TB = 1 trillion bytes; actual formatted capacity is less.

  • Power and Battery: Battery life for Apple TV app movie playback. Battery life varies by use and configuration. See apple.com/in/batteries for more information.

  • Touch ID: Magic Keyboard with Touch ID is included with iMac (M4) systems with 10‑core GPU, iMac (M3) systems with 10‑core GPU and iMac (M1) systems with 8-core GPU. It is available as an option on iMac (M3) systems with 8‑core GPU and iMac (M1) systems with 7-core GPU.
